**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Triggering the v5.7 cross-domain extremum, policy trend tracing, and office building circuit breaker probe. The official commercial system very mechanically classified it under 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing,' and its business scope includes highly heavy-asset activities such as 'power generation, transmission, and supply businesses' and 'permeable brick production.' However, the probe immediately executed a ruthless physical and spatial pulverization: although the enterprise's paid-in capital reaches a staggering 33.3 million RMB, the number of insured employees is only 10. The most fatal point is its registered address: 'Room 904, Building 02, Xincheng Development Center.' In a 9th-floor high-rise office building in a commercial district, it is absolutely impossible to produce permeable bricks, build a water treatment plant, and even less possible for a power plant to exist. The probe astutely captured its former name, 'Nanjing Jiandong Rainwater Utilization Technology Co., Ltd.', and combined with its enterprise name 'Sponge City,' perfectly deconstructed its commercial essence: this is a [Heavily-Capitalized Municipal Engineering Bidding Shell & Environmental Equipment Proxy] specifically designed to snipe the government's 'Sponge City' construction trend and undertake municipal engineering bidding. The 33.3 million paid-in capital is used to meet the financial entry thresholds for large-scale government infrastructure projects (such as urban drainage system transformation and rainwater collection engineering). Its core business is to use this 'golden signboard' to get projects from the government, and after winning the bid, subcontract the construction and building material production (permeable bricks, sewage interception devices) to downstream genuine factories and construction teams.
